subject: [tasks-system-redesign] [P4] Update all remaining client references and run final verification
description:
Clean up all remaining Pulse references in client code, update tests, and run the final verification gate.

## Remaining client references

Search the entire client codebase for any remaining references to "Pulse", "pulse", "Schedule" (in the context of task scheduling), and update them:

### Dashboard components
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-status/` — `SystemStatusRow`, `SubsystemCard`, `use-subsystem-status`: Update the health card that shows Pulse status to show "Tasks" status
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-attention/` — `NeedsAttentionSection`, `FailedRunDetailSheet`: Update references from pulse runs to task runs
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/dashboard-activity/` — `RecentActivityFeed`, `ActivityFeedItem`: Update event type references from pulse to tasks

### Activity and entities
- `apps/client/src/layers/entities/activity/` — `activity-types.ts`, `CategoryBadge`, `ActorBadge`: Update pulse category to tasks
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/activity-feed-page/` — filter bar, empty state: Update pulse references

### Agent-related components
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/` — topology elements, `AgentNode`, `NamespaceGroupNode`, `TopologyLegend`: Update pulse references
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/agents-list/` — `AgentRow`, `AgentsList`: Update references to pulse capabilities to tasks
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/agent-settings/` — `CapabilitiesTab`, `ContextTab`, `ConnectionsTab`: Update pulse tool references to task tools

### Onboarding
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/` — Update the onboarding step that was "PulsePresetsStep" to "TaskTemplatesStep". Update the step name in the onboarding flow, progress card, etc.

### Relay components
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/relay/` — `AdapterCard`, `AdapterCardBindings`, `ActivityFeed`: Update pulse dispatch references to task dispatch

### Settings
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/settings/` — `ToolsTab`, `ServerTab`: Update pulse tool configuration references to task tool configuration

### Shared utilities
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/tool-arguments-formatter.tsx`: Update pulse tool name formatting
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/ui-action-dispatcher.ts`: Update pulse action references
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/lib/favicon-utils.ts`: Update pulse status references
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-document-title.ts`: Update pulse references
- `apps/client/src/layers/shared/model/use-favicon.ts`: Update pulse status to tasks

### CSS
- `apps/client/src/index.css`: Check for any pulse-specific CSS classes and rename

### Dev/showcase files
- `apps/client/src/dev/` — Update all showcase files, simulator scenarios, section definitions that reference Pulse

## Run comprehensive search

```bash
grep -rni 'pulse\|schedule' apps/client/src/ --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' \
  | grep -v node_modules | grep -v dist | grep -v '.test.' \
  | grep -vi 'taskschedulebuilder\|taskscheduler' \
  | head -100
```

Fix every remaining reference. "Schedule" in the context of cron scheduling is acceptable (e.g., `TaskScheduleBuilder` is fine). "Schedule" meaning "a pulse schedule" must be updated to "task".

## Update tests

Update all remaining test files that reference old naming:
- Dashboard tests
- Activity tests
- Agent tests
- Onboarding tests
- Command palette tests
- Settings tests

## Final verification gate

```bash
pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run
```

All three must pass.

Do a final comprehensive grep for "Pulse" and "pulse" across the entire repository (excluding DB table names, node_modules, dist, git):

```bash
grep -rni 'pulse' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.md' \
  --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=dist --exclude-dir=.git \
  | grep -v 'pulse_schedules' | grep -v 'pulse_runs' | grep -v CHANGELOG
```

Zero results (aside from DB table name strings) confirms the rename is complete.

## Acceptance Criteria
- No "Pulse" references remain anywhere in the codebase (except DB table name strings)
- All dashboard, activity, agent, onboarding, settings, and relay components updated
- All tests pass
- `pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm test -- --run` passes
- The `/tasks` page is fully functional with filtering, sorting, and CRUD
- `TasksDialog` works on agent detail pages
- Sidebar navigation shows Tasks with Zap icon
- Damon is visible and functional as a system agent
- File-first task creation, editing, and deletion works end-to-end
activeForm: Updating all remaining client references and running final verification
